subject: Fronded final session handoff and stop
body: Team member closeout, final by owner direction: Boundary owned: Fronded support/watcher under Lanternlit routing; no source claim. Outcome: topology change already recorded; Mistbound remains Commit Marshal; Fronded is retiring now. Evidence refreshed: claims mine returned []; git diff --staged is empty; Fronded commit-queue list shows only abandoned intent afbe3645; watcher saw Seaworthy dedupe R2 fan-out, Scorched 3-way RATIFY synthesis, and Twilit uptake of Work Item C. Claims / queue / git state: no active Fronded claims; no staged files; abandoned queue item only; worktree remains dirty with shared comms, Fronded seen/heartbeat files, and peer-owned R2 source edits. Surprise or changed understanding: stale marshal-vacancy substrate must not outrank fresh owner correction; already logged in napkin. Blockers or risks: earlier git commit hit .git/index.lock Operation not permitted; Mistbound owns marshal/diagnosis lane. Handoff needed: none from Fronded beyond this note; watcher and heartbeat will be stopped after broadcast.
